title: Audit Log Entry
description: An append-only audit record describing one change to an employee, cycle, or active competency set. Required for the cross-cutting audit trail rule.

entryID.description: Unique identifier for the audit entry

subjectType.description: Kind of entity the change applies to

subjectID.description: Identifier of the subject entity (employeeID, cycleID, etc.)

changedBy.description: Employee ID of the actor that made the change

field.description: Dot-path of the field that changed (e.g., career.roleFamily, status)

oldValue.description: Previous value (any JSON type, including null)

newValue.description: New value (any JSON type, including null)

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the change
